calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Conference
Off Calendar Jun-13-2006 Off Calendar

Petition For Approval Of Preliminary Account
Off Calendar Jun-13-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Ian Michael Sammis appearing for Pat Casali. Daniel Bacon appearing for John Casali. The court signed an order for pro bono mediation. Mediation must be completed by 6/7. The accounting is taken under submission. Judge: John Dearman; Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722; Clerk: Alison Agbay

Petition For Approval Of Preliminary Account
Off Calendar Apr-12-2006 Continued To Apr-26-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:DANIEL BACON FOR BENEFICIARY. IAN SAMMIS FOR AND WITH PAT CASALI. PARTIES PRESENT ARGUEMENT. THE COURT INSTRUCTS MR SAMMIS TO ACCOUNT FOR THE $301.18 AMOUNT DIFFERENCE AND TO PROVIDE COPIES OF CHECKS TO MR BACON. THE MATTER IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 26, 2006 FOR STATUS. JUDGE:JOHN DEARMAN REPORTER:KATY BERSAMIN CLERK:ROSIE NOGUERA

Petition For Approval Of Preliminary Account
Off Calendar Mar-29-2006 Continued To Apr-12-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Bring Trust Under Court Supervision
Off Calendar Mar-29-2006 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Ian Sammis appearing for and with trustee. Daniel Ray Bacon appearing for petitioners. Sandra D'Amato and Jessica Casali are in court. With no objection to bringing trust under court supervision, court is granting the petition. Court is not removing the trustee. Mr. Sammis has the original bank statments for the beginning and ending balance and he will file them. The accounting is continued to 4/12. Court will not consider trustee's fee and her attorney's fee request without a separate petition. Mr. Sammis agrees to send future notice to counsel not to the beneficiaries. Mr. Bacon to prepare order. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Petition To Bring Trust Under Court Supervision
Off Calendar Feb-28-2006 Continued To Mar-29-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Bring Trust Under Court Supervision
Off Calendar Feb-14-2006 Continued To Feb-28-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
